activities_projects.title: Angle Deduction Challenge
activities_projects.objective: Apply the angle sum property of quadrilaterals
steps: Calculate the fourth angle using the angle sum rule
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Uses the fact that the sum of angles in a quadrilateral is 360°

activities_projects.title: Rectangle Diagonal Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Verify properties of diagonals in a rectangle
steps: Check if the diagonals are equal
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands that rectangle diagonals are equal and bisect each other
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of measurement and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Square Diagonal Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Explore properties of diagonals in a square
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Observes that diagonals of a square intersect at right angles

activities_projects.title: Parallelogram Angle Proof
activities_projects.objective: Verify properties of angles in a parallelogram
steps: Check if opposite angles are equal and adjacent angles add to 180°

activities_projects.title: Diagonal Bisector Activity
steps: Measure segments created by their intersection
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns that diagonals of a parallelogram bisect each other

activities_projects.title: Construct Your Own Parallelogram
activities_projects.objective: Construct a parallelogram using given side lengths and angle
steps: Draw two adjacent sides with given lengths
Create a given angle between them
Complete the parallelogram using parallel lines

activities_projects.title: Quadrilateral Classification Tree
steps: Write types of quadrilaterals such as square, rectangle, and parallelogram

activities_projects.title: Angle Puzzle Quadrilateral
steps: Create a quadrilateral with three known angles

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Quadrilateral Investigation
steps: Observe buildings, tables, windows, or boards
Classify them based on their properties
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies geometric knowledge to real-world objects

activities_projects.title: Quadrilateral Property Proof Poster
activities_projects.objective: Explain and present properties of quadrilaterals
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of explanation and accuracy (10 marks)
